events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail**, high risk — missing hanger nails leave Simpson connectors under-nailed relative to their catalog/ESR-rated capacity (per IRC R602.3/R602.10 referencing manufacturer install instructions). Since it's rough-complete but not yet closed in, the corrective path is straightforward: 100% re-check of hangers, fill missing holes with the specified fastener, and re-present to the inspector before cover-up.
